resources.string: Open the menu, then Settings, to install the Android runtime or add a connection to your PC or Mac.
Set up OpenCode on this Android device, or connect to a PC or Mac that is already running OpenCode.
Ask OpenCode to implement, fix, or investigate.
Prepare the runtime required to run OpenCode directly on this device.
The runtime is not installed yet.
Choose one AI provider. You can change it later in Settings.
Enter the API key for the selected provider. It is stored securely on this device.
Verify that the runtime and authentication settings are ready.
After a successful check, you can start chatting.
Enter the connection details for a PC or Mac that is running OpenCode.
The OpenCode server did not respond as healthy.
